author: Vaughn Vreeland
commentBody: I dont get all the rave reviews. The cheesecake layer never firmed up like cheesecake does. It wss VERY creamy, almost like it was only cookie butter. It was easy to make but it just felt like someone just made up the recipe without concern of it all working together. I served it to 9 people. No one cared for it. And 15 years of baking and never threw out leftovers except for this cake. I would never make this again.
readable_ai_guess: Didn't like recipe due to technique or equipment

commentBody: Wouldnt make those again. Didn’t really taste like cheesecake or have the same texture at all. Served it to a table of 8 and no one commented on it. It was a lot of work for zero payoff.

author: Vaughn Vreeland
commentBody: Loved the taste but they came out hard by time I served them after the allotted time to cook. Topped them with homemade ice cream Left overs I will microwave to soften up by the taste was amazing!

author: Sohla El-Waylly
commentBody: Ok first, cookies are amazing. Second, these are a pain in the butt to make and you need patience. Third, doesn’t make the amount it says. I only got 24 cookies out of this. Lastly, when you take these out of the freezer and start the egg wash, the egg wash freezes fast and almost no time to get the the almonds on so have the almonds in your other hand as soon as brush the egg wash. Lots of steps and time to make these but my god the taste is unreal!
